data.reasoning: Both models skipped the critical PKGBUILD file due to false binary detection, preventing any security assessment of build/install logic.
coverage_issues: No review of install hooks or build scripts
false_negatives: Entire package risk unknown: PKGBUILD defines all build/install behavior but was skipped
learnings: Fix binary detection: Use MIME/header checks instead of naive heuristics to prevent skipping text files like PKGBUILD
Prioritize critical files: Always force-review PKGBUILD/.install files first before other content
Add fallback mechanism: When file is skipped as binary, attempt hexdump analysis for critical files
Improve error handling: Fail audits explicitly when PKGBUILD can't be read
